title: angorkis gracilis
intro: Angorkis gracilis, also known as Gynura procumbens, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Angorkis gracilis include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis, and supporting immune system function. Angorkis gracilis is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
